title: Business Loans London
metaTitle: Business Loans London | Boxx Commercial Finance
metaDescription: Flexible business loans in London. Fast funding solutions for SMEs, growth and cashflow support.
content:
Looking for business loans in London? Boxx Commercial Finance helps businesses secure fast, flexible funding to support growth, cashflow and expansion.

London has one of the most active SME markets in the UK, with businesses across sectors requiring access to funding for growth, hiring and investment. What we typically see is that lenders are highly active in this market, particularly where businesses can demonstrate affordability and strong trading performance.

We can arrange funding for a wide range of purposes including managing cashflow, expanding operations, purchasing stock and investing in marketing.

  • Unsecured business loans
  • Secured business loans
  • Short-term funding
  • Long-term funding

Recently, we supported a London-based business with funding to support expansion into new markets, structuring the facility to align with their projected cashflow.

How it works:

  1. Tell us about your requirement
  2. We match you with lenders
  3. Receive terms
  4. Complete funding

FAQs

Can I get a business loan in London? Yes, most businesses can access funding depending on their circumstances.

How quickly can I get funding? In many cases, within a few days.

Speak to Boxx Commercial Finance today.
